description_under_test: Use when a coding agent must turn a software goal, bug, issue, or refactor into a small, verified, independently reviewed code change.
note: Opt-in trigger evals. These check that the SKILL.md frontmatter description fires on real coding work and stays quiet on non-work. They need a model (LLM-judge) to grade, so they are deliberately NOT part of the offline, model-free CI suite. Wire them to your host's judge if you want them. See evals/README.md.

Refactor the auth module across these four files and add tests
Fix the failing invoice rounding test and ship it
Migrate the users table to add a nullable column with a rollback plan
Add rate limiting to the public API endpoint with verification evidence
should_not_trigger: Fix this typo in the README heading
How does the rate limiter work?
This PR is already merged, nothing to do
